title: Galosphere Trimming
description: Makes items from Galosphere usable as trim materials.
body:
This mod makes it so you can use Palladium (Silver before 1.21.1) Ingots, Allurite Shards and Lumiere Shards from the [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere) mod as trim materials.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Pzuy21SU/images/75d1a4351654f83551547d1ee10c957d32783325.png)

[![](https://1drv.ms/i/c/6bf544900f9867ae/IQR3yxNMtle9S4RxniPeeGgMAVrcnQ4U65DGA1uiSdBUIbE?width=837&height=80)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
